cases.name: cfarray_empty_immutable
cases.description: Empty immutable array creation and zero-count observation.

cases.name: cfarray_immutable_cftype_borrowed_get
cases.description: Immutable array creation with kCFTypeArrayCallBacks plus borrowed Get pointer identity.

cases.name: cfarray_mutable_append_remove_retains
cases.description: Mutable array append/remove ownership with kCFTypeArrayCallBacks and borrowed Get semantics.

cases.name: cfarray_createcopy_borrowed_get
cases.description: Array CreateCopy ownership plus borrowed child pointer identity.

cases.name: cfdictionary_empty_immutable
cases.description: Empty immutable dictionary creation and zero-count observation.

cases.name: cfdictionary_immutable_string_key_lookup
cases.description: Immutable dictionary string-key lookup with borrowed Get and GetValueIfPresent semantics.

cases.name: cfdictionary_mutable_set_replace_remove_retains
cases.description: Mutable dictionary set, replace, remove, and deallocation ownership with string keys.

cases.name: cfdictionary_createcopy_borrowed_lookup
cases.description: Dictionary CreateCopy ownership plus borrowed lookup pointer identity.
